notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes a battle scene with multiple actors. Most events are publicly observable combat actions (方源 fighting 厉煌, 凤仙太子 destroying the formation, 巨阳仙尊's attack from the north). The only potentially hidden elements are: (1) 方源假扮凤仙太子 - but this is already known to 陈衣等人 (紫薇仙子提前通知了他们), so it's not a hidden fact from the perspective of those who matter. (2) 翼浩方假扮方源 - similarly, this is part of the same known deception plan. (3) 真正的凤仙太子被囚禁 - this is stated directly in the text as known information. None of these qualify as a hidden/future-known/player-visibility fact with clear whoKnows/whoDoesNotKnow supported by the seed. The seed does not provide direct source support for any actor privately knowing something that others don't, beyond what is already stated as common knowledge among the involved parties.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed describes battlefield actions (陈衣 monitoring, 方源 fighting, 厉煌等人 intercepting) but motives are ambiguous. Characters are acting in a war context with complex schemes (方源 disguised as 凤仙太子, 翼浩方 disguised as 方源). Observed behaviors are visible but inferred motives would require psychological leaps beyond cautious one-step inference. No clear observedMotive→inferredMotive pair with direct source support.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed primarily describes individual-level combat and infiltration (方源 disguised as 凤仙太子, fighting 厉煌/清夜/白沧水, 巨阳仙尊's attack on 天庭). Named factions (天庭, 灵缘斋, 南疆北原联盟) appear but the seed facts focus on individual actors (陈衣, 厉煌, 方源, 武庸, etc.) rather than collective faction-level stakes or pressures. 天庭 is mentioned as a faction but the seed shows individual 天庭蛊仙 acting under 陈衣's command in a specific battle, not a faction-wide pressure. 灵缘斋 appears only via 凤仙太子's affiliation. 南疆北原联盟 appears as a label for 方源/武庸/池曲由 but no collective stake is shown. The 巨阳仙尊 vs 星宿仙尊/龙公 event is a 九转-level clash between supreme individuals, not a faction pressure. No clear collective actor with a concrete stake in a pressure axis is sufficiently source-backed.
IF export filter quarantined 6 legacy old-schema branches.
